en: "If a man divorces his wife and she goes from him and becomes another man's wife, will he return to her? Would not that land be greatly polluted? You have played the whore with many lovers; and would you return to me? declares the LORD.
zh: 耶和華說：“人若是休妻， 妻子離開了他， 又嫁了別人， 前夫怎能與她復合呢？ 如果復合，那地不是大大玷污了嗎？ 你曾與許多情人行淫， 還想歸向我。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Lift up your eyes to the bare heights, and see! Where have you not been ravished? By the waysides you have sat awaiting lovers like an Arab in the wilderness. You have polluted the land with your vile whoredom.
zh: “你向光禿的高岡舉目看看， 哪裡沒有你的淫跡？ 你坐在路邊等候情人， 像阿拉伯人在曠野埋伏一樣。 你以淫亂和邪惡， 把這地玷污了。

en: Therefore the showers have been withheld, and the spring rain has not come; yet you have the forehead of a whore; you refuse to be ashamed.
zh: 所以甘霖停止， 春雨不降； 你還是一副妓女的面孔 ， 不顧羞恥。

en: Have you not just now called to me, 'My father, you are the friend of my youth-
zh: 你剛剛不是還呼叫我：‘我父啊！ 你是我年輕時的良伴；

en: will he be angry forever, will he be indignant to the end?' Behold, you have spoken, but you have done all the evil that you could."
zh: 耶和華怎會永遠懷怒， 常存憤恨呢？’ 你雖然這樣說了， 還是盡力去作惡。”

en: The LORD said to me in the days of King Josiah: "Have you seen what she did, that faithless one, Israel, how she went up on every high hill and under every green tree, and there played the whore?
zh: 約西亞王在位的日子，耶和華對我說：“背道的以色列所作的，她怎樣走上各高山，在每棵繁茂的樹下行淫，你看見了沒有？

en: And I thought, 'After she has done all this she will return to me,' but she did not return, and her treacherous sister Judah saw it.
zh: 我以為她作了這些事以後，就必回轉過來，可是她沒有回轉。她詭詐的妹妹猶大也看見了。

en: She saw that for all the adulteries of that faithless one, Israel, I had sent her away with a decree of divorce. Yet her treacherous sister Judah did not fear, but she too went and played the whore.
zh: 因背道的以色列犯了淫亂，我就給她休書，把她休了。我看見她詭詐的妹妹猶大還是不懼怕，照樣行淫。

en: Because she took her whoredom lightly, she polluted the land, committing adultery with stone and tree.
zh: 因以色列把自己的淫行視作等閒，去與石頭木頭行淫，就把這地玷污了。

en: Yet for all this her treacherous sister Judah did not return to me with her whole heart, but in pretense, declares the LORD."
zh: 雖然這樣，她詭詐的妹妹猶大還沒有全心歸向我，只是假意地歸我。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: And the LORD said to me, "Faithless Israel has shown herself more righteous than treacherous Judah.
zh: 耶和華對我說：“背道的以色列，比詭詐的猶大還顯得正義。

en: Go, and proclaim these words toward the north, and say, "' Return, faithless Israel, declares the LORD. I will not look on you in anger, for I am merciful, declares the LORD; I will not be angry forever.
zh: 你去，把這些話向北方宣告，說： ‘背道的以色列啊，回轉吧！’ 這是耶和華的宣告。 ‘我必不向你們變臉， 因為我是慈愛的， 我必不永遠懷怒。’ 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Only acknowledge your guilt, that you rebelled against the LORD your God and scattered your favors among foreigners under every green tree, and that you have not obeyed my voice, declares the LORD.
zh: ‘只要你承認自己的罪孽， 就是悖逆了耶和華你的 神， 在每棵繁茂的樹下，濫愛外族人的神， 沒有聽從我的話。’ 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Return, O faithless children, declares the LORD; for I am your master; I will take you, one from a city and two from a family, and I will bring you to Zion.
zh: ‘背道的人哪，回轉吧！’ 這是耶和華的宣告。 ‘因為我才是你們的主。 我要每城取一人，每族取二人， 把你們帶到錫安。

en: "'And I will give you shepherds after my own heart, who will feed you with knowledge and understanding.
zh: “我必把合我心意的牧人賜給你們，他們要用知識和智慧牧養你們。

en: And when you have multiplied and increased in the land, in those days, declares the LORD, they shall no more say, "The ark of the covenant of the LORD." It shall not come to mind or be remembered or missed; it shall not be made again.
zh: 當那些日子，你們在這地繁衍增多的時候，人必不再提說耶和華的約櫃，不把它放在心上，不思念它，不覺得缺少，也不再製造。’這是耶和華的宣告。

en: At that time Jerusalem shall be called the throne of the LORD, and all nations shall gather to it, to the presence of the LORD in Jerusalem, and they shall no more stubbornly follow their own evil heart.
zh: ‘那時，人必稱耶路撒冷為耶和華的寶座，萬國要聚集到她那裡，因耶和華名的緣故來到耶路撒冷；他們必不再隨從自己頑梗的惡心行事。

en: In those days the house of Judah shall join the house of Israel, and together they shall come from the land of the north to the land that I gave your fathers for a heritage.
zh: 在那些日子，猶大家必與以色列家同行，他們必從北方之地一同來到我賜給你們列祖為業的地方。’”

en: "'I said How I would set you among my sons, and give you a pleasant land, a heritage most beautiful of all nations. And I thought you would call me, My Father, and would not turn from following me.
zh: “我說： ‘我待你，像待兒女一樣， 賜給你佳美之地， 就是列國中最美好的產業； 我以為你會稱我為父， 不再離去不跟從我了。

en: Surely, as a treacherous wife leaves her husband, so have you been treacherous to me, O house of Israel, declares the LORD.'"
zh: 以色列家啊！ 妻子怎樣行奸詐對丈夫不忠， 你也照樣以奸詐待我。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: A voice on the bare heights is heard, the weeping and pleading of Israel's sons because they have perverted their way; they have forgotten the LORD their God.
zh: 在光禿的高岡聽到人聲， 就是以色列人哭泣懇求的聲音； 因為他們改轉了自己的道路， 忘記了耶和華他們的 神。

en: "Return, O faithless sons; I will heal your faithlessness." "Behold, we come to you, for you are the LORD our God.
zh: “背道的人哪，回轉吧！ 我必醫治你們背道的病。” “看哪！我們來到你這裡， 因為你是耶和華我們的 神！

en: Truly the hills are a delusion, the orgies on the mountains. Truly in the LORD our God is the salvation of Israel.
zh: 小山和大山上的喧嚷，真是徒然的， 以色列的救恩誠然在於耶和華我們的 神。

en: "But from our youth the shameful thing has devoured all for which our fathers labored, their flocks and their herds, their sons and their daughters.
zh: 從我們幼年以來，我們列祖勞苦得來的，他們的牛羊，他們的兒女，都給那可恥的偶像吞掉了。

en: Let us lie down in our shame, and let our dishonor cover us. For we have sinned against the LORD our God, we and our fathers, from our youth even to this day, and we have not obeyed the voice of the LORD our God."
zh: 但願我們躺臥在羞恥中，讓慚愧遮蓋著我們！因為我們得罪了耶和華我們的 神，從我們幼年直到現在，我們和列祖都沒有聽從耶和華我們的 神的話。”
